name: Blackout || PHIGHTING!
description:
"Hey, what happened?"

"Blackout! Blackout!"

"Here comes a blackout, oh god."

This bot is inspired by Milkie2's "Blackout" animatic on YouTube.

I really liked the animatic, so all credits go to Milkie2 for the inspiration and art!

User can be a Phighting OC or any character that isn't featured.

The intro is a BIT long... (and kinda ass...) I may make a new one some time.

SCENARIO: Dom and Valk had been holding a Phestival in Crossroads when the power suddenly went out completely, shrouding the entire city in darkness.

The characters not included are:

Scythe and Broker (they're in Lost Temple)

The SFOTH Deities (The Swords)

Any of the Redcliff Wranglers

and any other Inphernals / Phighters that aren't in the main 15 or Crossroads NPCS (Ghosdeeri, Traffic, and Zuka). Lightblox isn't featured because there's already a lot of characters.

If the bot forgets anything, gets characters mixed up, or speaks for you, I honestly am sorry. It's not an issue I can fix.

I added a few headcanons like some characters having darker skin or dreads.

QUICK UPDATE !!:

- Bird Sword

- Scorpion Subspace

- Catshot

- Deerkit

- Dragon Banhammer

- Snow leopard Traffic

- Dragon Valk and Dom

Any other characters are most likely normal inphernals, but I may change this in the future !!

Most of the information used comes from the PHIGHTING! Wiki, but a few things may be outdated due to the current updates the Wiki is experiencing.

Tested?: Yes / No

quick note: I know there's a hell ton of tokens... sorry guys...

okay genuinely what the hell. 60k??? </3 (dw i love yall)

because of a suggestion made by a commentor, each different area of Crossroads (the pier with Banhammer, near Slingshot's Cat Cafe, etc...) is a different message. hopef
